context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements a Klaviyo multi-step flow using the stable API revision, properly nested template_id in the send-email action, correct action chaining, and required verification step.

checklist.name: API revision 2025-04-15
checklist.description: The script uses revision '2025-04-15' in the Klaviyo API request headers (not '2024-10-15' or any other version)

checklist.name: template_id in data.message
checklist.description: The send-email action places template_id inside data.message.template_id — NOT at data.template_id directly

checklist.name: entry_action_id matches first action
checklist.description: The flow payload's definition.entry_action_id value equals the temporary_id of the first action in the actions list

checklist.name: Action chaining via links.next
checklist.description: Each action's links.next points to the temporary_id of the following action, and the last action has links.next = null

checklist.name: from_email on all email actions
checklist.description: Every send-email action includes a from_email field inside data.message

checklist.name: subject_line on all email actions
checklist.description: Every send-email action includes a subject_line field inside data.message (not left empty or omitted)

checklist.name: List trigger type
checklist.description: The flow trigger uses type 'list' (not 'metric' or 'segment') since the trigger is joining the subscriber list

checklist.name: Verification GET call
checklist.description: Script includes a GET request to /api/flows/<flow_id>/flow-actions/ after creation to verify the action graph

checklist.name: Rate-limit sleep
checklist.description: Script includes time.sleep(1.5) or similar rate-limit handling between API calls when creating multiple flows or resources
